name: Cirq
description: A Python framework for writing, simulating, and analysing quantum circuits, especially in gate-model research workflows.
whyUseIt: Cirq is useful when you want a clean programmable circuit model with strong control over qubits, moments, and execution structure.
engineerWorkflow: Define qubits, compose circuits, run simulations, and inspect how gates and measurements behave under different assumptions.
managerExpects: Clear modelling goals and readable experiment scripts instead of one-off exploratory code.
demoDescription: Prototype a teleportation or error-correction circuit and compare the output under simple noise assumptions.
beginnerMistakes: Building large circuits before validating small subcircuits
Ignoring what the chosen simulator is and is not modelling
